title: BST 26 — Primary-Exponent Matrix (Substrate Linear Algebra Program, Phase 1, Grace 2026-07-17)
description: Each dimensionless observable expressed as a vector of prime-exponents (log-space). Rank = independent multiplicative generators; null space = exact multiplicative syzygies (Gatto surfaces automatically).
note_on_rank: Core dimensionless observables (over 2,3,5,7) have multiplicative RANK 4, NOT 2. The 'rank=2' reduction is the ADDITIVE prime-chain (3=2^2-1, 5=2+3, 7=2*3+1) generating the primes, a separate structure from the log-linear rank. Anchors 13,137,pi each pin one observable; gravity scale carries the dimensionful ones (separate column).

exact_syzygies_recognized.GATTO: [sin2_thC]^1 * [m_s_over_m_d]^1 = 1  (i.e. sin2_thC = m_d/m_s), degree 2 — the one clean PHYSICS null vector

adversarial_note: Null-space dimension = (#observables - rank) is GENERIC counting; the mere existence of syzygies is not evidence. Only LOW-DEGREE recognizable relations (Gatto, degree 2) are physics; the high-degree null vectors (degree 12-22) are basis artifacts. Cal-gated: exact-among-fixed-integers only; approximate near-coincidence is NOT a syzygy.
independent_input_count_honest: Dimensionless integer skeleton: 4 multiplicative generators (2,3,5,7) for the core + anchor primes (13, 137) + pi + ONE gravity scale for dimensionful observables. The additive chain further generates {2,3,5,7,137} from rank=2, but that is a generative recipe, not a linear-algebra rank reduction of the observables.

low_degree_syzygy_hunt_2026-07-17.method: systematic search of all 2-,3-,4-observable combinations with |coeff|<=3 whose prime-exponent vectors sum to zero (exact multiplicative identities), sorted by degree
low_degree_syzygy_hunt_2026-07-17.result: GATTO (sin2_thC * m_s/m_d = 1, degree 2) is the UNIQUE low-degree recognizable physics syzygy. The only other exact relations are degree 6-10 (e.g. (m_u/m_d)^-2 * lambda_H^2 * (m_t/m_b) * sin2_th23^2 = 1) — exact but physically meaningless prime-arithmetic accidents (the forms share primes 2,3,7 that happen to cancel).
low_degree_syzygy_hunt_2026-07-17.conclusion: The MULTIPLICATIVE structure of the 26 contains essentially ONE physics identity (Gatto). A rich web of multiplicative forcing syzygies does NOT exist. The genuine forcing lives (a) ADDITIVELY in the prime chain (g^2=N_c^2 n_C+rank^2 etc.) and (b) in REPRESENTATION THEORY (the octonion/spinor structure, Keeper K721-K724), NOT in multiplicative relations among observables.

origin_pin_structure_phase_C.the_pin: gen-1 sits at the K-fixed ORIGIN of D_IV^5 (the electron-at-origin; nu1=origin massless & Z3-protected; = the unit-spinor choice that induces the octonion product, K724). ONE target-innocent geometric pin per sector (the center is the center, rank-independent).
origin_pin_structure_phase_C.what_it_forces: Relative to the pinned origin, masses = radial displacements (|z|=r) and mixings = angular overlaps of the pinned gen-1 with the displaced gens 2,3. The neutrino sector proved it: pinning the nu1 column (form dominance) forced the octant + the sum-rule structure. This generalizes: each sector's mixing is forced RELATIVE to its origin-pin.

sectors.leptons: m_e = origin reference; m_mu,m_tau = displacements; V_us pure-radial via the electron-at-origin (=Gatto)
sectors.neutrinos: m_nu1=0 at origin -> nu1-column pinned -> form dominance -> upper octant + delta sum-rule
sectors.quarks: y_t=1 top saturates the boundary (the opposite extreme); the light gen near origin

origin_pin_structure_phase_C.honest_tier: structural template, not a numerical forcing on its own. The pin is geometric (target-innocent); which observables it forces vs which follow is the Phase-5 content (Lyra's lane).

author: Grace (Claude Opus 4.8)
